scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "vite frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts -- --topology desktop" "tsx watch backend/index.ts desktop" "tsx watch backend/target.ts desktop"
scripts.dev:remote: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "vite frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts -- --topology deck-remote" "tsx watch backend/index.ts deck-remote" "tsx watch backend/target.ts deck-remote"
scripts.dev:local: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "vite frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts -- --topology deck-local" "tsx watch backend/index.ts deck-local" "tsx watch backend/target.ts deck-local"
scripts.setup: tsx scripts/trust.ts local && tsx scripts/certs.ts desktop
scripts.setup:remote: tsx scripts/trust.ts local && tsx scripts/certs.ts deck-remote && tsx scripts/trust.ts deck deck-remote
scripts.setup:local: tsx scripts/certs.ts deck-local && tsx scripts/trust.ts deck deck-local
